Second-round pick CJ Allen, a linebacker out of Georgia, and third-rounder A.J. Haulcy, an LSU safety, bring immediate impact potential. That’s especially true with Allen, who’ll replaced Zaire Franklin and run the defense from the Mike position. [...]

That would have been an ideal time for the Colts to resolve trade requests two players submitted. In Richardson’s instance, no team was [...]
